purpose: ROI #77 — declare which tools require docker today and which can run direct (host-native). Provides migration plan to remove docker dependency where possible so anima ops stay container-less by default.

policy.rationale: anima primary value chain (hexa scripts, airgenome offload, AOT binaries) must run on bare hosts (mac/ubu1/htz). Docker is ONLY tolerated for the optional observability stack (#84) and may be replaced by systemd-managed binaries in the migration plan below.

audit_inventory.name: anima_serve_endpoint
audit_inventory.notes: tool/anima_serve_smoke.hexa runs as plain hexa script; no container.

audit_inventory.name: hexa_tools
audit_inventory.notes: tool/*.hexa invoked directly via /opt/homebrew/bin/hexa or remote `hexa` after Linux parity fix (#75).

audit_inventory.name: airgenome_supervisor
audit_inventory.notes: launchd-managed on mac, systemd on linux. No container layer.

audit_inventory.name: h100_launch_ops
audit_inventory.notes: tool/h100_*.bash + airgenome offload. Pod side may use vendor container, but anima orchestrator is host-native.

audit_inventory.name: grafana_dashboard
audit_inventory.notes: ONLY docker dependency in anima. Used by ROI #84 dashboard.

audit_inventory.name: hivemind_runtime
audit_inventory.notes: experimental cluster — not on critical launch path. Migration deferred.

migration_plan.objective: Reduce docker dependencies to zero on critical launch path; keep optional for experimental clusters.

phases.action: Document SSOT (this file). No code changes.
Provide systemd unit files for prometheus + grafana + alertmanager binaries (apt-installed, not container) as a parallel option. Container path remains default until P2.
Switch htz dashboard host to systemd-managed binaries. Remove docker-compose.yml from active path (keep file for rollback only).
Move docker-compose.hivemind.yml under experiments/ to make it clear it is non-critical.

verification.test_command: grep -rln 'docker' tool/ | grep -v container_less_runtime || echo 'no docker references in tool/'
verification.expected: tool/ remains 100% docker-free; only config/grafana/ + docker-compose.* root files contain docker.
